item.title: Sahil Bloom Just Shared a ‘Major Cheat Code for Life.’ It’s a Lesson in Emotional Intelligence
item.description: “The goal isn’t to avoid the fall,” says Sahil Bloom. “It’s to shorten the time between the fall and the reset.”

item.title: Employers: Stop Doing Surprise Phone Interviews
item.description: It’s rude and a bad use of everyone’s time.

item.title: Kotter and ADKAR Work—So Why Do Most Leaders Use Them Wrong?
item.description: Most change initiatives fail because leaders focus on strategy while ignoring psychology. Here is how to address both.

item.title: The End of Multi-Billion-Dollar Tech Companies
item.description: Investors are signaling AI pessimism, but it’s more about corporate tech decay.

item.title: Why Mark Cuban’s Definition of Capitalism Should Be Embraced by Everyone (But Not for the Reason You Might Think)
item.description: Because to Cuban, capitalism means living the life you want to live.
